title: Update bd ready and bd blocked to use EffectiveBlockers
description:
Two command updates in one task since they share the same pattern:

bd ready (internal/cmd/ready.go): Replace isReady() helper with graph.IsEffectivelyBlocked(). Read cascade config flag from app config store, pass as bool. Delete the old isReady() function.

bd blocked (internal/cmd/blocked.go): Replace getWaitingOn() with graph.EffectiveBlockers(). Show inherited blockers in text output as 'Parent blocked: <ancestor> blocked by [<blockers>]'. Add inherited_blockers field to JSON output. Delete old getWaitingOn() function.

Update tests for both commands. See GRAPH_AND_CASCADE_DESIGN.md sections on bd ready and bd blocked.
close_reason: Updated bd ready, bd blocked, and bd stats to use EffectiveBlockers with cascade support
